title: matelea calcicola
intro: Matelea calcicola, also known as the calcicole matelea or tropical milkweed vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, due to the presence of certain alkaloids. The health benefits of Matelea calcicola include its potential use in treating wounds and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Matelea calcicola can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using a tincture, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a medical professional.
